lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: What can I do for you young 'un?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... I've heard you druids might be able to teach me herblore...

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: Herblore eh? You're probably best off talking to Kaqemeex about that; he's the best herblore teacher we currently have. I believe at the moment he's at out stone circle just North of here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't need to speak to you.

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: Well, we all make mistakes sometimes.

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: What can I do for you young 'un?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any more work for me, to help reclaim the circle?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any more work for me to help reclaim the stone circle?

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: Ah, you've come just in time. I need a certain herb for the next part of the purification ritual...

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: It used to be quite common, but nowadays only the trolls know where to find it. They use it in their cooking, you see. It's a very prized ingredient.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And what exactly do you want me to do?

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: Journey to the north into the land of the trolls, and find the secret of the herb the trolls call 'goutweed'.

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: My friend Eadgar lives in the area, and he may be able to help you. Bring some goutweed back and I will teach you something useful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll do it.

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: Thank you, adventurer!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: Oh well. No doubt some other adventurer will eventually come who can help me.

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: 'm afraid you are not yet learned enough in the art of Herblore to be able to help me, adventurer...

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: Not just yet, young 'un.

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: What can I do for you young 'un?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there, can you tell me something about this Sanfew Serum, like how do I make it, and what does it do?

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: Certainly. It was after all, my creation, and mine alone. If anyone should know how to make it, it should be me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can't fault that logic!

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: Ok, essentially this potion is a mixture of a cure poison, cure disease and restore stats all rolled into one! Very handy for the adventurers with an eye on conserving inventory space.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'm sold... How do you make it?

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: Well, it's very easy really. You take a standard super stat restore potion. Add some ground unicorn horn. Then, add some snake weed from the island of Karamja. Finally, add some nail beast nails. You can

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: only get these from the area of Morytania, specifically, if you go deep in the Mort Myre swamp.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you mean, deep into the Mort Myre swamp?

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: Well, most adventurers avoid the deep Mort Myre swamp, whereas the Paterdomus trek and the Burgh de Rott trek take you through the most interesting areas. These area's often allow the quickest, but potentially

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: more dangerous routes through Mort Myre. This is where you're likely to encounter a Nail beast.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are they very dangerous?

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: They can be pretty dangerous. They'll defend for a long time, then attack suddenly and seemingly without warning, landing three viscious attacks at once. This can be pretty lethal. However, the nail beasts themselves

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: are curiously wounded from the Sanfew Serum itself...very bizzare, that a potion made from their claws should have such a pronounced effect on them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, that's very helpful. Many thanks for your assistance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Did you say you needed more goutweed?

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: I don't need any more goutweed for the ritual, but it's still quite difficult for me to get. If you ever come across some, bring it to me; I'll exchange it for some other herbs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some more goutweed for you.

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: Ah, good. Here are some herbs in exchange.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any more work for me to help reclaim the stone circle?

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: Well, not right now I don't think young 'un. In fact, I need to make some more preparations myself for the ritual. Rest assured, if I need any more help I will ask you again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't need to speak to you.

lines.speaker: Sanfew
lines.text: Well, we all make mistakes sometimes.
